g.text: FIG-11-05. Horizon Bank Payment Resilience View
Solid arrows show normal production traffic.
Dashed arrows show replication or recovery paths.
RTO and RPO are modelled objectives, not guarantees without tested operations.
Core Deposit System remains an external dependency during recovery.
Replication is not a backup; the backup store is a separate recovery copy.
Redundancy alone does not prove resilience without tested failover, failback and reconciliation.
